Your AI agents are running.
Do you know what they're doing?

AI agents and automation systems are powerful — until they fail silently, overspend, or make decisions no one can explain. Agentic Management Systems gives you visibility, control, and operational confidence across every agent in your stack.

Schedule a consultation View capabilities

The problem no one talks about

Most teams deploy AI agents without the infrastructure to manage them. The consequences compound quietly — until they don't.

73%

No visibility into agent behavior

Teams can't see what agents are doing, why they made a decision, or where they failed. When something breaks, debugging is guesswork.

4–10×

Cost overruns in production

Agentic loops, retries, and unbounded tool calls burn through API budgets. Most teams don't know their actual spend until the invoice arrives.

89%

No systematic quality checks

Agents degrade over time. Model updates, prompt drift, and edge cases erode performance — with no automated way to catch regressions.

0

Audit trail for compliance

Regulated industries need to explain AI decisions. Most agent deployments have no structured logging, no trace history, no accountability.

What Agentic Management Systems provides

A unified control plane for every AI agent and automation system in your organization — purpose-built for operational excellence.

Unified Agent Registry

Complete inventory of every agent: what it does, what it can access, who owns it, and its current status. One source of truth.

Full Trace Observability

Every decision, tool call, and token — logged and searchable. Understand exactly what happened and why, down to the millisecond.

Cost Intelligence

Real-time spend tracking per agent, per workflow, per customer. Set budgets, get alerts, and eliminate surprise invoices.

Anomaly Detection & Alerts

Automated monitoring for failures, cost spikes, latency issues, and behavioral drift. Know before your users do.

Evaluation Framework

Continuous quality checks and regression testing. Catch degradation before it reaches production.

Access Control & Audit

Granular permissions, action logging, and compliance-ready audit trails. Built for regulated environments.

Engagement models

From initial assessment to fully managed operations — choose the level of support that fits your organization.

Foundation

Assessment & Setup

  • Agent inventory and risk assessment
  • Observability infrastructure setup
  • Cost tracking and alerting
  • Documentation and runbooks
  • Team training session
Get started
Growth

Managed Operations

  • Everything in Foundation
  • Ongoing monitoring and incident response
  • Monthly optimization reviews
  • Evaluation framework management
  • Dedicated Slack channel
Book consultation
Enterprise

Full Partnership

  • Everything in Growth
  • Custom integrations and tooling
  • On-call support with SLAs
  • Quarterly business reviews
  • Dedicated account team
